message:
fix: correct UTF-8 truncation in 5 additional files

The previous fix pattern (using i >= targetLen) could still exceed the
maximum byte limit when a multi-byte character ends after the target.
The fallback "return s" could also return strings exceeding maxLen.

Fixed files:
- internal/pipeline/pipeline.go
- internal/output/text.go
- internal/cli/checkpoint.go
- internal/cli/history.go
- internal/robot/markdown.go

All now use the correct pattern:
- Use i > targetLen (break before exceeding)
- Track prevI to always slice at a valid rune boundary
- Return s[:prevI] + "..." as fallback instead of full string

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
